GOLDEN, CARA AHEARN, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1609 BRODERICK STREET, S.F. $3,182.00 RENT, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $288.47 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,100.47, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. PLTF AWARDED POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE FROM MICHAEL BERGER, PAUL LEIGHTON, CARA GOLDEN AND PATRICK AHEARN. PLTF AWARDED MONEY DAMAGES FROM MICHAEL BERGER AND PAUL LEIGHTON ONLY.
